src/main/java/pl/gry/lotto/infrastructur.general_idea: Changed the hardcoded URL path for the random number service to match a new microservice endpoint.
Added IllegalArgumentException to the catch block to handle potential parsing or validation errors from the client.
Replace deprecated HttpStatus-based status checking with the new HttpStatusCode API introduced in Spring 6/Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/pl/gry/lotto/infrastructur.human_impl: Changed `httpResponse.getStatusCode()` return type from `HttpStatus` to `HttpStatusCode` and replaced `series == SERVER_ERROR` checks with `statusCode.is5xxServerError()` and `statusCode.is4xxClientError()`.

src/main/java/pl/gry/lotto/infrastructur.general_idea: Replace javax.validation imports with jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3 and Java 21.
Updated the import statement for the Valid annotation from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.

src/test/java/pl/gry/lotto/LottoApplicat.general_idea: Removed imports and static field related to Testcontainers MongoDB container, likely moving container management to a base class or removing the test dependency.
src/test/java/pl/gry/lotto/LottoApplicat.human_impl: Removed imports for org.testcontainers and the static MongoDBContainer field definition.

src/test/java/pl/gry/lotto/LottoApplicat.general_idea: Added static import for JUnit 5 assertions to enable concise assertion usage in tests.

src/test/java/pl/gry/lotto/domain/number.general_idea: Changed the return type of findAllById from Iterable to List to align with Spring Data JPA repository interface changes in Spring Boot 3.
Changed the return type of findAllById from Iterable to List to align with Spring Data JPA repository interface changes in Spring Boot 3.

src/test/java/pl/gry/lotto/domain/result.general_idea: Changed the return type of findAllById from Iterable to List to align with Spring Data JPA repository interface changes in Spring Boot 3.
Changed the return type of findAllById from Iterable to List to align with Spring Data JPA repository interface changes in Spring Boot 3.

src/test/java/pl/gry/lotto/integration/f.general_idea: Updated the WireMock stub URL to match the new randomizing microservice endpoint path.

src/test/java/pl/gry/lotto/integration/n.general_idea: Updated the mock server endpoint path in the integration test to match the new microservice API structure.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from version 2.7.8 to 3.2.2 to align with Java 21 support and modern Spring ecosystem.
Update Maven compiler source, target, and java.version properties from 17 to 21.
Bump Lombok dependency version from 1.18.22 to 1.18.34 for compatibility and bug fixes.
Remove explicit JUnit Jupiter Engine version property as it is managed by Spring Boot 3.
Remove explicit Mockito Core dependency to rely on the version managed by Spring Boot Starter Test.
Reorder dependency declarations for better logical grouping and readability.
pom.xml.human_impl: Moved spring-boot-starter-data-mongodb and added comments for sections.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add section comments to dependencies for improved maintainability.
Remove explicit finalName configuration from the build plugin, relying on default behavior.
